svg.text: Four age bands, 2014 to current. The gap is most readable once 16-17 and 18-19 are separated.
The teen transition is clearest once 16-17 and 18-19 are separated.
BLS A-8b seasonally adjusted participation rates, 2014 to current.
Source: BLS A-8b table, seasonally adjusted participation rates by age and sex.
